name: Summer Ocean
description: Refreshing breeze and sandy beaches. A cool summer vibe with sea glass panels.
css: body { background: linear-gradient(180deg, #e0f7fa 0%, #b2ebf2 100%); background-attachment: fixed; } body::after { content: ''; position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 200px; background: url('data:image/svg+xml;utf8,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 viewBox=%220 0 1440 320%22%3E%3Cpath fill=%22%234fc3f7%22 fill-opacity=%220.2%22 d=%22M0,192L48,197.3C96,203,192,213,288,229.3C384,245,480,267,576,250.7C672,235,768,181,864,181.3C960,181,1056,235,1152,234.7C1248,235,1344,181,1392,154.7L1440,128L1440,320L1392,320C1344,320,1248,320,1152,320C1056,320,960,320,864,320C768,320,672,320,576,320C480,320,384,320,288,320C192,320,96,320,48,320L0,320Z%22%3E%3C/path%3E%3C/svg%3E'); background-size: cover; animation: wave 10s linear infinite alternate; pointer-events: none; z-index: -1; } @keyframes wave { from { transform: scaleX(1); } to { transform: scaleX(1.1); } } .card, .panel, .surface { backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border: 1px solid rgba(179, 229, 252, 0.6) !important; } .header { backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(179, 229, 252, 0.8) !important; } .sidebar { backdrop-filter: blur(24px); border-right: 1px solid rgba(179, 229, 252, 0.4) !important; } .text-center .w-12.h-12 { background-color: #00bcd4; border-radius: 50%; color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 188, 212, 0.4); }
